package rulecoverage

func NegativeStringToByteForSingleCharCheck() string {
    ruleID := "string_to_byte_for_single_char_check"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`[]byte(s)[0]` or `string(b) == \"x\"` for single-character comparisons"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
